message:
fix(mux): improve error handling in SSH hostname and localpane leader cache

- ssh.rs: replace expect() with proper anyhow error for missing hostname
  in SSH config — prevents panic when SSH config lacks hostname field
- localpane.rs: add descriptive expect message on CachedLeaderInfo unwrap
  documenting the invariant (all branches initialize the value)

Validated: 299 mux + 177 SSH tests pass via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
